How many groups are there in the modern periodic table?
Elements in the same group of the periodic table have similar:
Which of the following elements is a noble gas?

fill_in_the_blanks.question: The vertical columns in the periodic table are called ________.
The elements in Group 17 are known as ________.
The periodic table is arranged in increasing order of ________ number.
The first period of the periodic table contains only ________ elements.
Elements in the same period have the same number of ________.

short_questions.question: What is a group in the periodic table?
short_questions.answer: A group is a vertical column of elements that share similar properties.

short_questions.question: Name one characteristic of elements in the same group.
How many periods are there in the periodic table?
short_questions.answer: There are seven periods in the periodic table.

short_questions.question: What is the significance of the atomic number in the periodic table?
short_questions.answer: The atomic number determines the position of an element in the periodic table.

short_questions.question: Which group contains the alkali metals?
